meta.title: An geama fhaclan làitheil
meta.description: Tomhais am facal falaichte ann an sia oidhirpean (no nas lugha). Bidh tòimhseachan ùr ri fhaighinn gach latha!
meta.keywords: Gàidhlig, tòimhseachan, facal, cluich, geama, air loidhne, tomhais, a' tomhas, gach latha, facle

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Gaelic. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Gaelic as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Gaelic. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Gaelic. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Gaelic. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Gaelic. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Gaelic. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Gaelic. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

word_detail.title: Wordle #{idx} — {date} — {word} | Freagairt {langNative}
word_detail.description_with_def: B' e {word} am freagairt Wordle {langNative} airson {date} (#{idx}). {partOfSpeech}{definition}
word_detail.description_without_def: B' e {word} am freagairt Wordle {langNative} airson {date} (#{idx}). An urrainn dhut tomhas ann an 6 oidhirpean?
word_detail.description_coming_soon: Facal Wordle {langNative} #{idx}. A' tighinn a dh'aithghearr.

word_archive.title: Wordle {langNative} — Na h-uile Facal | Tasglann Fhaclan
word_archive.description: Rùraich na h-uile {count} facal Wordle a bh' ann roimhe ann an {langNative}. Faic mìneachaidhean, ealain AI, agus staitistig na coimhearsnachd airson gach facal làitheil.

best_starting_words.title: Na Faclan Tòiseachaidh as Fheàrr airson Wordle ann an {langNative} — Wordle Global
best_starting_words.description: Mion-sgrùdadh stèidhichte air dàta air na faclan tòiseachaidh as fheàrr airson Wordle ann an {langNative}. Rangaichte a rèir còmhdach litrichean thairis air {count} facal.

text.no_attempts: Chan eil thu air facal sam bith fheuchainn fhathast!
text.share_challenge_win: Fhuair mi Wordle an-diugh ann an {n} oidhirpean. An urrainn dhut mo bhualadh?
text.share_challenge_lose: Cha d'fhuair mi Wordle an-diugh. An urrainn dhutsa?
text.notification_copied: Chaidh a chur air an stòr-bhòrd
text.hard_mode_position: Modh duilich: feumaidh {letter} a bhith ann an dreuchd {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Modh duilich: feumaidh {letter} a bhith san fhacal

help.title: Mar a chluicheas tu seo
help.text_1_1_2: ann an sia oidhirpean no nas lugha.
help.text_1_2: Feumaidh gach oidhirp a bhith na fhacal slàn a tha còig litir a dh’fhaid. Brùth air a' phutan ENTER feuch a bheil thu ceart.
help.text_1_3: Às deidh dhut tomhas a dhèanamh, thig atharrachadh air dathan nan leacagan is innsidh seo dhut dè na litrichean dhen fhacal a tha ceart no cha mhòr ceart.
help.text_2_1: : anns an fhacal agus san àite cheart!
help.text_2_2: : anns an fhacal ach chan ann san àite cheart.
help.text_2_3: : chan eil seo san fhacal a tha ri thomhas.
help.text_3: Bidh facal ùr ri thomhas gach latha!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Mìneachadh is ealain AI às dèidh a' gheama
ui.play_more_languages: Cluich barrachd chànanan gus na staitistigean iomlan fhaicinn!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Cluich Wordle gach latha mar aplacaid
ui.no_games_yet: Cha do chluich thu fhathast. Tagh cànan gus tòiseachadh!
ui.easy_desc: Thèid facal sam bith a ghabhail, fiù 's mura h-eil e san fhaclair
ui.normal_desc: Feumaidh oidhirpean a bhith nam faclan dligheach on fhaclair
ui.hard_desc: Feumaidh sanasan a chaidh a nochdadh a bhith air an cleachdadh ann an oidhirpean às dèidh sin
ui.todays_word_reveal: Facal an latha — Cluich gus a nochdadh!
ui.future_word: Cha deach am facal seo a chluich fhathast. Thig air ais nas fhaide air adhart!
ui.difficulty_locked: Chan urrainnear an duilgheadas atharrachadh às dèidh tomhas
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_languages_counting: cànan agus a' fàs — air an cur ris gu cunbhalach.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — agus barrachd a' tighinn.

seo.play_in_languages_sub: A h-uile canain an-asgaidh. Gun chunntas.
seo.footer: wordle.global — geama-fhacal lathail an-asgaidh ann an 80+ canain
seo.tile_correct: san fhacal agus san aite cheart.
seo.tile_semicorrect: san fhacal ach san aite cheàrr.

value_props.title: 80+ canain
value_props.desc: Bho Arabais gu Iorùbais. An Wordle ioma-chanainach as motha.

value_props.title: Mineachaidhean fhacal
value_props.desc: Ionnsaich brigh gach facail an deidh cluiche.

tips.title: Tòisich le fuaimreagan
tips.text: Dearbhaidh CRANE no ADIEU litrichean cumanta gu luath.

tips.title: Cleachd na tha fios agad
tips.text: Uaine seasmhach. Buidhe gluais. Liath air falbh.

tips.title: Cuir às
tips.text: Bu choir don darna facal litrichean ura fheuchainn.

tips.title: Litrichean dubailte
tips.text: Mura h-eil na sanasan a' freagairt, smaoinich air litir a-rithist.

tips.title: Modh cruaidh
tips.text: Sparraidh e ort sanasan dearbhte a chleachdadh.

tips_speed.title: CRANE
tips_speed.text: Litrichean bitheanta — an cothrom as fhearr.

tips_speed.title: Na smaoinich cus
tips_speed.text: Bheir Speed Streak duais don fhaireachdainn.

tips_multiboard.title: Farsaing
tips_multiboard.text: Litrichean cumanta airson sanasan air gach bòrd.

tips_multiboard.title: Bùird dhoirbh
tips_multiboard.text: Cuimsich air a' bhòrd le as motha neo-aithnichte.

tips_multiboard.title: Litrichean co-roinnte
tips_multiboard.text: Da bhòrd le E buidhe? E ann an àite ur.

tips_multiboard.title: Gleidh tomhas
tips_multiboard.text: Tomhas a bharrachd aig an deireadh.

seo.mode_desc_classic: 6 tomhasan airson facal falaithe 5-litir. Cleachd sanasan dhathan.
seo.mode_desc_unlimited: 6 tomhasan, 5 litir. "Cluich a-rithist" — gun chrìoch lathail.
seo.mode_desc_speed: 3 mionaidean. Gach facal a' toirt bonus uine (+60s airson 1, +10s airson 6). Caillte: 30s. Combo gu 3x. Nas luaithe gach 3.
seo.mode_desc_multiboard: {modeName}: {boardCount} bùird, {maxGuesses} tomhasan. Tomhas air gach bòrd. Fuasgailte reothte. Meur-chlàr sgaraichte.

faq.q: Ciamar a chluicheas mi Wordle ann an {langName}?

faq.a: Tha. An aon fhacal do na h-uile.
Tha. Gach modh ann an 80+ canain.

speed.a: Wordle an aghaidh a' ghleoc. 3 mionaidean.
Nas lugha de thomhasan = barrachd phuingean. 3x combo.

howto.name: Leugh na sanasan
howto.text: Uaine = ceart. Buidhe = àite ceàrr. Liath = chan eil ann.
